meaning: n.[鱼]胡瓜鱼 vbl.smell的过去式和过去分词vt.精炼,冶炼
examples: In a horrid silence, Mrs. Darling smelt the bowl.
The dog had smelt a rabbit.
The room smelt strongly of polish.
But the scientific evidence shows that the smelt exist at many different salinity levels.
The gas is known as the silent killer because it cannot be seen or smelt.
